title: TerramityPlus
description: This modpack is heavily focused on the mod Terramity and what mods fit with it.
body:
Venture to the world of Terramity with carefully picked mods!

This modpack is optimized by mods like [Modern Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) and adds QoL mods to enhance the game along with the one and only [Terramity](https://modrinth.com/mod/terramity) mod!

If you want to know more about Terramity, click the link above to check out the mod website or check the in-game book, which acts like a wiki!

This modpack adds mods like
- [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) for favoriting your worlds
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) for automatising production for example. iron ore

This modpack even adds mods that change the look of the game!
- [Item Highlighter](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-highlighter), which highlights new items added to the inventory
- [Immersive UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-ui), which changes how the items behave in the inventory when picked up or hovered over
